languages.text: "Нунциус, тебе должно быть стыдно за введение Вольного Торговца в заблуждение. Ты прекрасно знаешь, что это физическая необходимость, а не прихоть или ленность".
"Nuncius, you should be ashamed of yourself for misleading the Rogue Trader. You know perfectly well that this is a physical necessity, not a whim or laziness."
languages.original_text: "Нунциус, тебе должно быть стыдно за введение Вольного Торговца в заблуждение. Ты прекрасно знаешь, что это физическая необходимость, а не прихоть или ленность".

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius, you should be ashamed of yourself for misleading the Rogue Trader. You know perfectly well that this is a physical necessity, not a whim or laziness."
"Nuncius, you should be ashamed of yourself for misleading the Rogue Trader. You know perfectly well that this is a physical necessity, not a whim or laziness."
"Nuncius, you should be ashamed of yourself for misleading the Rogue Trader. You know perfectly well that this is a physical necessity, not a whim or laziness."

languages.text: «Nuncius, debería darte vergüenza confundir de ese modo {mf|al|a la} Comerciante Independiente. Sabes perfectamente que se trata de una necesidad física, y no de un simple capricho ni de pereza».
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, you should be ashamed of yourself for misleading the Rogue Trader. You know perfectly well that this is a physical necessity, not a whim or laziness."

traits.locale_text: «Nuncius, debería darte vergüenza confundir de ese modo {mf|al|a la} Comerciante Independiente. Sabes perfectamente que se trata de una necesidad física, y no de un simple capricho ni de pereza».

languages.text: “努恩修斯，你误导了行商浪人，你该为此感到羞愧才是。你很清楚，这是生理需求，绝非一时兴起或懒惰。”
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, you should be ashamed of yourself for misleading the Rogue Trader. You know perfectly well that this is a physical necessity, not a whim or laziness."

traits.locale_text: “努恩修斯，你误导了行商浪人，你该为此感到羞愧才是。你很清楚，这是生理需求，绝非一时兴起或懒惰。”

languages.text: « Nuncius, tu devrais avoir honte d'induire ainsi {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} en erreur. Tu sais aussi bien que moi qu'il s'agit d'une nécessité physique qui n'a rien à voir avec de la fainéantise. »
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, you should be ashamed of yourself for misleading the Rogue Trader. You know perfectly well that this is a physical necessity, not a whim or laziness."

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius, tu devrais avoir honte d'induire ainsi {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} en erreur. Tu sais aussi bien que moi qu'il s'agit d'une nécessité physique qui n'a rien à voir avec de la fainéantise. »

languages.text: "Nuncius, Hür Tacir'i yanılttığın için kendinden utanmalısın. Bunun heves ya da tembellik değil, fiziksel bir zorunluluk olduğunu gayet iyi biliyorsun."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, you should be ashamed of yourself for misleading the Rogue Trader. You know perfectly well that this is a physical necessity, not a whim or laziness."

traits.locale_text: "Nuncius, Hür Tacir'i yanılttığın için kendinden utanmalısın. Bunun heves ya da tembellik değil, fiziksel bir zorunluluk olduğunu gayet iyi biliyorsun."

languages.text: 「ヌンキウス、ローグトレーダーを欺くとは恥を知りなさい。これが気まぐれや怠惰ではなく、身体的な必要によるものだと、君は重々承知しているはずです」
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, you should be ashamed of yourself for misleading the Rogue Trader. You know perfectly well that this is a physical necessity, not a whim or laziness."

traits.locale_text: 「ヌンキウス、ローグトレーダーを欺くとは恥を知りなさい。これが気まぐれや怠惰ではなく、身体的な必要によるものだと、君は重々承知しているはずです」

languages.text: "Nuncius, Ihr solltet Euch schämen, {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} in die Irre zu führen. Ihr wisst sehr gut, dass es eine physische Notwendigkeit ist, keine Laune oder Faulheit."
languages.original_text: "Nuncius, you should be ashamed of yourself for misleading the Rogue Trader. You know perfectly well that this is a physical necessity, not a whim or laziness."
